title: Simple calculations between two number widgets in DASHBOARD

posts.author: Emil (Emil)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday team,

My organization was promised the ability to use two number widgets in the dashboard and make simple calculations such as calculating conversion rates. Unfortunately, we are still not able to do this.

When can we expect this feature to be released?

posts.author: Steffen (Steffen Hoh)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 on this! Any roadmap on this feature?

posts.author: Emil (Emil)
posts.cookedHtml:
@CSG

Hi is there any anything new?

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Steffen @matheusprestes @Emil

While we wait monday to implement that feature, I just wanted to let you know that you can do that with our Screenful Reports add-on. Our new Table chart allows doing calculations across different monday boards. You can also do calculations between sums of columns, not just individual rows. The resulting chart can be placed on a monday dashboard.

Release+2021-02+Banner1500×560 153 KB

You can learn more about this feature from this blog post.

posts.author: matheusprestes (Matheus)
posts.cookedHtml: 26 months later and still waiting a feedback from the team…
